Founder Mode

CCC Daily Tracker

Track the few numbers that actually move the business.

MVP note: this form is visual for now. Next step is wiring it to Supabase or local storage.

Daily Founder Scoreboard

Win the day by creating traffic, leads, usage, or revenue.

Traffic

Did people visit /reset/ or the homepage today?

Leads

Did anyone join the email list or start the reset?

Usage

Did anyone start a check-in or use CCC?

Revenue

Did CCC generate or move closer to income?

Founder rule: no guessing.
Track the numbers. Make one move. Repeat tomorrow.
